case_title: LYONS,JERRY VS YEN,ANN Q. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YEN,ANN Q.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYONS,JERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEN,ANN Q. SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET $212.88 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $227.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
